title: Persistent Goal-Seeking Intelligence Accumulation Engine
short: Show how the system accumulates capability, evidence, and economic value over time.
problem: One-off automations do not create durable institutional intelligence unless the system remembers what worked, where, why, and under what constraints.
mission: Define a persistent GoalOS loop where missions produce artifacts, artifacts produce evidence, evidence produces selection, and selected artifacts improve future work.
why: This card establishes the system as a persistent self-improving institution rather than a single AI workflow demo.
plans: Route future work through proven artifacts
